> Aegis Cloud is an AI-powered remote Windows endpoint management platform that lets IT professionals, MSPs, and power users monitor, control, and automate Windows PCs from anywhere through a secure web dashboard.

## Docs

- [Features Overview](https://aegiscloud.in/features): Complete feature breakdown including AI assistant, real-time monitoring, automation, file management, remote terminal, and enterprise security
- [Pricing Plans](https://aegiscloud.in/pricing): Subscription tiers - Free (2 devices), Pro ($9/mo, 10 devices), Business ($29/mo, 50 devices), Enterprise (custom)
- [Security](https://aegiscloud.in/security): End-to-end encryption, TLS 1.3, JWT auth, 2FA, RBAC, zero-trust architecture, SOC 2 target, GDPR compliant
- [About Us](https://aegiscloud.in/about): Company mission, values, team information, and journey
- [Contact](https://aegiscloud.in/contact): Support channels, sales inquiries, partnership opportunities, and contact form

## Guides & Tutorials

- [How to Manage Multiple Windows PCs Remotely](https://aegiscloud.in/blog/how-to-manage-multiple-windows-pcs-remotely): Comprehensive guide covering setup, monitoring, automation, and best practices for managing multiple Windows devices remotely
- [AI-Powered Endpoint Management: Complete Guide](https://aegiscloud.in/blog/ai-powered-endpoint-management-complete-guide): In-depth exploration of AI in endpoint management, benefits, implementation strategies, and future trends
- [Remote Windows Service Management Made Easy](https://aegiscloud.in/blog/remote-windows-service-management-made-easy): Step-by-step tutorial on remotely managing Windows services using natural language commands

## API Reference

- [API Documentation](https://api.aegiscloud.in/docs): Interactive FastAPI Swagger UI with all endpoints
- [ReDoc Documentation](https://api.aegiscloud.in/redoc): Alternative API documentation format
- Authentication: JWT Bearer tokens, refresh token rotation
- WebSocket: Real-time device communication via `wss://api.aegiscloud.in/ws`

## Key Tools & Capabilities

### System Monitoring
- Real-time CPU, RAM, GPU, disk, network, and battery metrics
- Live dashboards with auto-refresh
- Historical performance data and trend analysis
- Custom alerts and notifications

### AI Assistant
- Natural language command interface
- Pre-approved tool execution only (zero-trust)
- Multi-step reasoning and task automation
- Context-aware responses with device memory

### Remote Management
- 29+ approved tools (system_info, cpu_usage, ram_usage, disk_usage, clean_temp, list_processes, kill_process, restart_service, etc.)
- File browser with upload/download capabilities
- Remote terminal with PTY support
- Scheduled task automation

### Automation & Scheduling
- Daily/weekly/monthly maintenance schedules
- Event-triggered workflows
- Policy engine for compliance
- Batch operations across device groups

## Product Highlights

- **Lightweight Rust Agent**: < 20MB RAM, < 1% CPU, runs as Windows Service
- **Zero-Trust Security**: AI can only execute pre-approved tools, never arbitrary commands
- **Plugin Ecosystem**: Extensible with custom plugins via Rust SDK
- **Cross-Platform Support**: Windows 10/11 (64-bit), future Linux/macOS support
- **Enterprise-Grade**: Role-based access control, audit logs, compliance reporting

## Use Cases

- **IT Administrators**: Manage hundreds of workstations from a single dashboard
- **MSPs (Managed Service Providers)**: Serve multiple clients with centralized management
- **Power Users**: Monitor and maintain multiple personal devices
- **Small Businesses**: Affordable endpoint management without dedicated IT staff
- **Developers**: Test and debug Windows applications remotely

## Technical Specifications

- **Frontend**: Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- **Backend**: FastAPI, Python 3.13, PostgreSQL 16, Redis 7
- **Agent**: Rust, tokio async runtime, Windows Service API
- **Security**: TLS 1.3, AES-256, JWT, TOTP 2FA, Ed25519 signatures
- **Payment**: Lemon Squeezy (Merchant of Record, handles global tax compliance)

## Quick Start

1. Sign up at [aegiscloud.in](https://aegiscloud.in) (free plan: 2 devices, 5 AI queries/day)
2. Download Windows Agent (15MB installer)
3. Install agent on Windows PC (installs as service, auto-connects)
4. Enter pairing code in dashboard
5. Start managing remotely via web dashboard or AI assistant

## Pricing Comparison

| Plan | Price | Devices | AI Queries | Key Features |
|------|-------|---------|------------|--------------|
| Free | $0/mo | 2 | 5/day | Basic monitoring, community support |
| Pro | $9/mo | 10 | Unlimited | Advanced monitoring, device groups, priority support |
| Business | $29/mo | 50 | Unlimited | RBAC, API access, audit logs, SSO |
| Enterprise | Custom | Unlimited | Unlimited | On-premise, SLA, dedicated support, custom integrations |

**Aegis Cloud — AI-Powered Windows Endpoint Management Platform**
